englishDefinitions: To be silent, morose, and bad-tempered out of annoyance or disappointment.
persianTranslation: اخم کردن و تو لک رفتن
examples: Don't sit there and sulk just because you lost the game.
He went to his room to sulk after his parents said he couldn't go out.
She has been sulking all day because I forgot our anniversary.
